# Ayah Daily (One Verse Daily)
Ayah Daily provides a daily Quran verse with clear translation, brief tafsir,
and Quran tilawat (recitation/audio) for Islamic education and reflection. It is
free, ad-free, and requires no login. Available in 12 languages.

Primary URLs:
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/en
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/bn
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/ar
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/ur
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/id
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/tr
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/fa
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/ms
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/fr
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/es
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/hi
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/sv

Sections (replace {locale} with one of: en, bn, ar, ur, id, tr, fa, ms, fr, es, hi, sv):
- Surah browser (all 114 surahs): https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}/surahs
- Individual surah (id 1-114): https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}/surah/{id}
- Glossary (key Quran terms): https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}/glossary

Key Pages:
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/en/about
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/en/how-it-works
- https://ayah-daily.web.app/en/faq

Full overview for LLMs: https://ayah-daily.web.app/llms-full.txt
Sitemap: https://ayah-daily.web.app/sitemap.xml
